form.formComment: At the latest run 9th of 12 at Toulouse on March 18 over 1600m, slow going 4.5 len behind Amusante carrying 53kg at $33. The race before that 2nd of 11 at Pau All Weather on February 23 over 1600m, nose behind Kodvedev with 54kg at $13. Not keen on her chances.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 48-day let-up. Most recently second last in a small field at Dos Hermanas Sand on February 22 over 1500m, 9 len behind Stepinmydirection with 55.5kg. The run before that 2nd in a small field at Dos Hermanas Sand on February 1 over 1900m, slow going 3 len behind Highlighting with 53.5kg. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after four months 5th of 13 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 14 len behind Alpenveilchen with 58kg at $8.30. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Deauville All Weather on November 1 over 1900m, 5.5 len behind Lethal Beauty carrying 58kg at $31. Will come on from that run and is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. At the latest run raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 9 over 2000m, 4 len behind Adiccion with 56.5kg at $10. The run before that 7th of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 4 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Camponanes carrying 52.5kg at $24. Will jump at pretty long odds and deservedly so.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1600m, 3 len behind Harissa with 58kg at $12. Will derive great benefit from that hit-out and looks a great chance to break through.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 9 at Saint-Cloud on November 9 over 1500m, on a wet track; 16 len behind Argentella with 58kg at $10. form.formComment: First-starter by Fighting Irish out of Noble Princess. Profiles well and worth watching for any market moves.
